title: PV Sindhu's Early Steps to Stardom in Macau
indian_angle: This story delves into the formative years of Indian badminton icon PV Sindhu, highlighting her journey from Macau to global recognition.
summary: A look back at PV Sindhu's initial training and experiences in Macau, which laid the foundation for her illustrious career.

title: India to Host Junior Asia Championships Selection Tournament
indian_angle: This tournament is crucial for identifying India's top young talent to represent the nation at the upcoming Badminton Asia U17 & U15 Junior Championships.
summary: BAI announces the selection tournament for the Badminton Asia U17 & U15 Junior Championships 2026, setting the stage for India's next generation of players.

title: Asian Games Squad Reassembles; Treesa-Gayatri Back
indian_angle: The reassembly of the Thomas Cup squad, including the return of Treesa Jolly and Gayatri Gopichand, is vital for India's medal prospects at the Asian Games.
summary: India's badminton squad for the Asian Games, featuring key players like PV Sindhu, Lakshya Sen, and the returning Treesa-Gayatri pair, has reassembled for training.

title: Tanvi Sharma's Game Style: Saina or Sindhu?
indian_angle: This article explores the playing style of rising Indian shuttler Tanvi Sharma, drawing comparisons to national legends Saina Nehwal and PV Sindhu.
summary: An analysis of young Indian talent Tanvi Sharma's evolving game, examining whether it aligns more with the aggressive Saina Nehwal or the defensive PV Sindhu.

title: Grassroot Coaches Program in Guwahati & Raipur
indian_angle: The BAI's coaches development program is crucial for nurturing talent at the grassroots level across India, ensuring a strong future for the sport.
summary: The Badminton Association of India is conducting a Coaches Development Program for the grassroot level in NCE Guwahati and Raipur from July 15-24, 2026.

title: BAI Warns Against Unauthorized Badminton Leagues
indian_angle: The BAI's repeated advisories against unauthorized leagues are aimed at protecting players and maintaining the integrity of badminton within India.
summary: The Badminton Association of India has issued multiple advisories warning players and officials against participating in unauthorized badminton leagues and tournaments.
